LAW AND MOTION 302, MTN TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT; REQ. TO ENTER JUDGMENT AND REQ. FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFT'S IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $29,748.16, WHICH INCLUDES $20,000 REMAINING DUE TO PLAINTIFF, $2,250.00 INTEREST ACCRUED TO DATE ON THE AMOUNT DUE, $348.16 FOR COSTS, AND $7,150.00 FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR #5976; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed as to the balance of the case pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Continued To Mar-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn To Enforce Settlement; Req. To Enter Judgment And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft'S
Off Calendar Jan-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBERT H. BOHN, JR. of Bohn & Fletcher, LLP, Tel No. (408) 279-4222 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMY TEAGUE'S Motion To Enforce Settlement, and Request To Enter Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. Pursuant to the terms of the parties' settlement agreement, judgment is entered in favor of Plaintiff in the amount of $29,748.16, which includes $20,000 remaining due to Plaintiff, $2,250.00 interest accrued to date on the amount due, $348.16 for costs, and $7,150.00 for reasonable attorney's fees. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)
